name: What should I do right now if Perplexity is hallucinating fake quotes from my publication?
description: Screenshot hallucinations attributing fakes to you, document confusion, send legal notice to Perplexity, and consult IP counsel ASAP.[1]

mainEntity.name: What should I do right now if Perplexity is hallucinating fake quotes from my publication?

acceptedAnswer.text: Screenshot hallucinations attributing fakes to you, document confusion, send legal notice to Perplexity, and consult IP counsel ASAP.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Immediately capture screenshots of the hallucinated content falsely attributed to your work, including Perplexity's use of your trademarks.[1] This supports Lanham Act claims for false designation of origin, as it confuses users and tarnishes your reputation for accuracy.[1] Preserve metadata and test queries to replicate; notify Perplexity via their abuse form while preparing legal notice.[1] Key factors: proof of confusion, reputational harm, and trademark registration strength.[1] Act fast to mitigate damage and build a case for injunction and damages.
